title: Morinda pacifica
taxonomy: Morinda pacifica is classified within the family Rubiaceae. This family comprises approximately 13,000 species and is one of the largest families of flowering plants. Morinda pacifica, along with other members of the Rubiaceae family, is an angiosperm, meaning it produces flowers and seeds within a closed structure. The species is further categorized as a member of the Rubieae tribe and the Morindinae subtribe. The classification is based on the plant's morphological and molecular characteristics.
